violations.text: The condensate from the walk-in freezer unit is draining onto the shelving and the ground. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the beverage coolers have an accumulation of biofilm and soil residue. New Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2023

The floors throughout the back storage area have an accumulation of soil residue and other debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2023
